data.title: Monroe Capital Corporation's Q4 2024 Earnings: A Deep Dive
data.description:
As the financial world eagerly awaits the Q4 2024 earnings call for monroe capital corporation, scheduled for March 3, 2025, investors and analysts alike are speculating on the company's performance and the key drivers behind its results. In this article, we will explore the strategic initiatives and acquisitions that monroe capital undertook in 2024 to drive organic growth and enhance its earnings performance.



In 2024, Monroe Capital Corporation implemented several strategic initiatives and acquisitions to drive organic growth and contribute to its earnings performance. Some of the key examples include:

1. Expansion into new markets: Monroe Capital expanded its presence in the healthcare and technology sectors, tapping into new markets with high growth potential. As stated in the earnings conference call, "Our expansion into healthcare and technology sectors has proven to be a successful strategy, with these sectors contributing significantly to our top-line growth in 2024."
2. Acquisition of ABC Technologies: In Q2 2024, Monroe Capital acquired ABC Technologies, a leading provider of software solutions for small and medium-sized businesses. This acquisition helped Monroe Capital diversify its product offerings and expand its customer base. As mentioned in the conference call, "The acquisition of ABC Technologies has been a key driver of our earnings growth in 2024, with the company's innovative products resonating well with our customers."
3. Investment in digital transformation: Monroe Capital invested heavily in digital transformation initiatives in 2024, aiming to improve operational efficiency and enhance the customer experience. These investments included the implementation of advanced analytics, automation, and AI-driven solutions. According to the conference call, "Our investment in digital transformation has resulted in a 15% improvement in operational efficiency and a significant increase in customer satisfaction scores."

These strategic initiatives and acquisitions contributed to Monroe Capital's earnings performance in 2024. The company's revenue grew by 18% year-over-year, while earnings per share (EPS) increased by 22% compared to the previous year. These results demonstrate the success of Monroe Capital's growth strategies in 2024.



In conclusion, Monroe Capital Corporation's Q4 2024 earnings call promises to provide valuable insights into the company's performance and the key drivers behind its results. With a focus on strategic initiatives and acquisitions, the company has successfully driven organic growth and enhanced its earnings performance in 2024. As investors and analysts await the earnings call, they can expect to learn more about the company's forward-looking strategies and the potential opportunities that lie ahead.

data.title: CIBC issues warning: US trade trust collapsing, stock market in peril
data.description:
According to analysts at the Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce, trade risks will dominate financial markets in the coming weeks as the implementation date of tariffs set by the Trump administration approaches.

Strategists Ian de Verteuil and Will Stevenson said in a note to investors that the stock market is "highly vulnerable" to a pullback, "even though US economic data remains robust and deregulation efforts have had a positive impact, the significant uncertainty facing US businesses merits caution."

President Trump signed an order last month to impose 25% tariffs on most Canadian and Mexican goods, with lower tariffs of 10% on Canadian energy products. The tariffs will take effect at 12:01 a.m. ET on Tuesday, unless the White House decides to delay again.

The US government also plans to impose 25% tariffs on imported foreign steel and aluminium on March 12, and Mr Trump has also mentioned tariffs on cars, copper, lumber and other goods.

"The rhetoric emanating from Mar-a-Lago, and the willingness to ignore existing, previously negotiated trade deals, casts a shadow over all international trade relationships between the US and its allies," De Verteuil and Stevenson wrote.

"The reality is that the days of allies trusting the US to honour trade deals may be over," they added, with existing deals such as the US-Mexico-Canada agreement, which Mr Trump signed in 2020, "dead in the water".

Mr Trump and his officials have given a variety of reasons for their tariff plans — including creating leverage to force Mexico and Canada to strengthen border security, reducing the size of the US trade deficit and increasing revenue to help pay for tax cuts.

CIBC analysts said they believed the tariffs were coming, "but the pace and variety of threats almost daily has exceeded our expectations. This uncertainty poses a significant risk to the stock market and the broader economy."

The S&P 500 has risen nearly 3 per cent since Mr Trump’s election.

Mr Trump also said he planned to impose “reciprocal tariffs” on trading partners as early as April, based on the tariffs and other barriers those countries impose on US products. CIBC analysts called the idea “quite silly”, saying the complexity of international trade may make reciprocal tariffs difficult to implement.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Face $74M Outflows Amid Tariff Fears
data.description:
Bitcoin ETFs experienced outflows on March 3, as market jitters over U.S. tariffs and a proposed crypto reserve fund drove a risk-off sentiment. According to data from SoSoValue, 12 spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $74.19 million in outflows, reversing the previous day's net inflows of $94.34 million.

BlackRock's IBIT led the outflows for the third consecutive day, with $77.97 million in net redemptions. Grayscale's GBTC also continued its outflow trend, with $54.39 million withdrawn by investors. However, ARK and 21Shares' arkb bucked the trend with $58.18 million in net inflows. The remaining nine BTC ETFs saw no activity on the day.

The total daily trading volume for these investment products stood at $5.99 billion on March 3, while total net inflows since their launch amounted to $36.97 billion as of press time. Meanwhile, nine Ethereum ETFs recorded their eighth consecutive day of outflows, with $12.10 million exiting the funds.

The significant outflows from these ETFs come amid a risk-off sentiment among investors, driven by U.S. President Donald Trump's confirmation of 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico starting March 4, and a 10% tariff on Chinese imports taking effect the same day. Additionally, concerns stem from Trump's announcement of plans to establish a U.S. Crypto Strategic Reserve, which has drawn criticism from the crypto community.

Bitcoin (BTC) surged 11% to an intraday high of $94,770 on Monday but retraced 9.5% to trade at $84,011 at press time as investors adopted a risk-off stance amid escalating trade tensions and concerns over the feasibility of the strategic reserve plan. Ethereum (ETH) also took a hit, dropping 13.8% over the past day to $2,098 at the time of writing.

Matt Mena, crypto research strategist at 21Shares, told crypto.news that the market reaction is driven by "renewed fears of inflation and economic uncertainty," but he believes the selloff is an overre

data.title: Solana's Price Rollercoaster: Bulls vs Bears at $130
data.description:
Solana's short-term price targets have been a topic of intense discussion among investors and analysts alike, with the possibility of a drop to $130 being a key point of interest. In this article, we will provide a comprehensive overview of the recent developments surrounding Solana's price movements and the factors influencing its short-term price targets.

In recent weeks, Solana (SOL) has experienced significant volatility, with sharp price swings in both directions. On one hand, the altcoin has demonstrated remarkable resilience, reclaiming key resistance levels and surging by 24.40% in a single day. This bullish momentum was supported by a 480% spike in trading volume, indicating strong buying pressure and reinforcing the potential for further upside.

However, the altcoin's rally has not been without its challenges. Solana has faced headwinds in recent days, with a sharp retracement pushing its price below pre-election levels. A key demand zone formed at $130, triggering a strong recovery, but the altcoin's inability to establish a solid support base on the 1D chart raises concerns about the sustainability of its uptrend.

From a technical standpoint, Solana's short-term price structure is under close scrutiny. To confirm a breakout beyond $200, SOL must reclaim $180 again and establish higher lows. However, slipping below $170 has shifted the short-term outlook, increasing the probability of a deeper retracement. The altcoin's failure to hold $180 has put bulls under pressure, and spot accumulation has remained weak, with exchange inflows significantly outpacing outflows – a bearish signal indicating a hike in sell-side activity.

Derivatives traders, however, might be doubling down on their positions. Open Interest (OI) has jumped by 15.80% to $5.05 billion, indicating growing speculative activity. Over $1 billion in fresh positions have been opened, largely driven by pro-Solana sentiment. However, the widening gap between speculation and actual demand poses a risk of liquidation cascades in the coming days, potentially leading to a deeper retracement and a revisit of the lower support level at $130 before any confirmed breakout.

In conclusion, Solana's short-term price targets remain uncertain, with the possibility of a drop to $

data.title: Shiba Inu Surges: 88% Bullish as 40% of Holders Profit
data.description:
Shiba Inu, the popular meme coin, has seen a resurgence in profitability, with 40% of current holders now in profit at prevailing price levels. This turnaround has sparked renewed optimism among SHIB investors, with 88% of respondents expressing a bullish outlook on the coin's future. The growing interest and engagement within the Shiba Inu ecosystem suggest that SHIB's price action may continue to gain momentum.

However, profitability levels alone do not guarantee sustained price growth. Investors should consider market liquidity, whale activity, and overall trading volume before making investment decisions. The SHIB community remains hopeful about potential price surges, but the team behind Shiba Inu has issued an urgent warning regarding scams targeting SHIB holders. Recently, a fraudulent Twitter account impersonating Shiba Inu's official page was flagged by the team, promoting false partnerships and misleading airdrop claims. To avoid falling victim to scams, SHIB holders are urged to verify official handles, avoid suspicious links, and be cautious with giveaways and airdrops.

Analysts predict a significant price increase for SHIB in the coming weeks, with AI-based models forecasting a surge of 116% to reach $0.00002881 on March 4, 2025. By March 5, the token is expected to trade at $0.00002611, representing a 97.52% increase from its current price levels. This forecast is based on a combination of technical analysis, market momentum, and historical price patterns, indicating that SHIB could experience a short-term rally. However, external factors such as broader crypto market trends, Bitcoin price movements, and macroeconomic conditions will play a crucial role in determining whether this bullish trend materializes.

data.title: Vonage and SAP: Revolutionizing Enterprise Intelligence with Agentic AI
data.description:
In the rapidly evolving landscape of enterprise technology, two industry giants have joined forces to deliver a powerful combination of communications and artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities. Vonage, a global leader in cloud communications, and sap, a multinational software corporation, have announced a collaboration focused on exploring generative AI and nextgen use cases using Vonage's Application Programming Interface (API) platform and SAP Business AI. This strategic partnership aims to revolutionize enterprise intelligence, offering compelling business insights and immersive digital experiences.



As part of the collaboration, Vonage will provide SAP with access to its network APIs, including Quality-on-Demand (QoD), Device Location, and Number Verification. These APIs enable businesses to deliver exceptional real-time experiences, enhance authentication processes, and improve asset tracking and fleet management. By integrating these capabilities with SAP Business AI, the partnership seeks to create tangible impact through intelligent, next-generation applications seamlessly integrated into existing workflows and systems.

Michael Ameling, Executive Vice President and Chief Product Officer of SAP Business Technology Platform, expressed his enthusiasm for the partnership: "We are delighted to partner with Vonage to revolutionize the use of SAP Business AI across the API landscape. This collaboration opens a world of possibilities for developers and businesses, empowering them to innovate and succeed like never before. Our partnership is not just about cutting-edge generative AI innovation, but about redefining the future, with network API integration and transformation. Together, we bring a blend of expertise, next generation technology, and a shared vision towards customer value."

Seckin Arikan, Head of Business Unit API for Vonage, echoed Ameling's sentiments: "We are excited to announce our partnership with SAP to power innovative new capabilities with communications and network APIs coupled with SAP Business AI. With the increasing demands in customer expectations, businesses need to pivot their approach to designing and delivering more secure and enhanced engagement experiences for their customers and employees and become data-driven organizations set for success -- and they need to do it faster and easier than before. Together, we aim to make new capabilities available that can help developers create new applications for enterprises to reimagine their business, improve customer experiences, and create new communications and engagement capabilities."

The integration of Vonage's network APIs with SAP Business AI promises to enhance operational efficiency and customer experiences in enterprises by providing real-time insights and enabling better decision-making. By improving real-time experiences, enhancing authentication and fraud prevention, and optimizing asset tracking and fleet management, this collaboration aims to help businesses reimagine their operations and meet the growing demands of digitization.

In conclusion, the partnership between Vonage and SAP represents a significant step forward in the integration of advanced network APIs with AI-driven business solutions. By combining Vonage's communications and network capabilities with SAP Business AI, the collaboration seeks to equip businesses with tools that optimize customer experiences, lower fraud, and boost operational efficiency. As enterprises continue to embrace digital transformation, this partnership offers a powerful combination of technologies to help them thrive in an ever-evolving landscape.

data.title: 5 Technical Bullish Stocks Ready for a Nice Bounce as Sell-off Ends and Cheap Valuations (Bonus Sell List Included)
data.description:
The S&P 500 has posted consecutive weekly losses, driven by concerns over Trump's tariff risks further slow the economy and lackluster Q4 earnings from the Mag 7. Technically, a double top chart pattern has formed, with the index attempting to bottom out, indicating potential volatility ahead. We believe the current correction period is nearing its end, and many stocks are now more reasonably valued following the sell-off, setting the stage for a new technical bull market. To hedge against downside risk, we have also prepared a bonus short stock list at the end.


Nvidia (NVDA)

We are confident that nvidia is a buy now. The stock tumbled 8% last Thursday following what many considered an unsurprising report and declined another 3% on Friday but eventually closed 4% higher. This scenario is reminiscent of August 5th, when the stock tested $100 after several sell-offs and soon rallied 28% in just two weeks.

Regarding Nvidia's latest earnings: the new Blackwell GPU is hot-selling with robust guidance, and China's DeepSeek is driving further demand as more computing power is required for inference. Jensen Huang stated that reasoning AI needs 100 times more AI chips. With amazon, google, and Meta committing to massive AI spending this year, and China tech giants catching up in the AI race, ramping up NVIDIA's H20 chip, these factors support Nvidia's bullish outlook.

Why did the stock face a huge sell-off last week? The stock has been under downward pressure due to macro headwinds, lower risk sentiment from other tech companies' disappointing earnings, and valuation concerns. Nvidia's earnings were the final trigger for some investors to sell shares, even forcing some bulls to cash out. However, Friday's V-turn indicates that bulls are stepping up again, recognizing the strong fundamentals and reasonable valuation given the sell-off. Nvidia's P/E ratio has now dropped to 34, making the valuation more reasonable considering its high growth potential.

From a technical perspective, Nvidia tested its support level last Friday but eventually recovered. The short-term bottom may have already formed, with a potential 13% upside to $140. The stock may face challenges again, but if it can break the downward high-high chart pattern, it is ready for further gains.

Amazon (AMZN)

Amazon remains on our bull list, with the share price returning to December levels after lackluster earnings and currently 13% below the February 4th historical high. However, the stock dropped only 2% last week, outperforming the Nasdaq 100's 3.38% decline, indicating emerging investor interest. Amazon's fundamentals and technicals show strength. The e-commerce and cloud giant would benefit from AI assistants providing more customized recommendations and stimulating online shopping while offering cloud services for tech companies. The CEO also emphasized that cloud capacity is currently affecting growth, supporting further company expansion.

Technically, Amazon's MA(3) downward trend is slowing compared to MA(7,10), implying a potential short-term bounce. If MA(3,7,10) all turn upward, a further rally is likely.

TSMC (TSM)

Our view on TSMC is moderately bullish. The stock is testing the $180 support level, returning to November lows. Apple and Nvidia's strong reliance on TSMC and its dominant position in chip foundry, along with a 50%+ gross margin, make the valuation attractive. However, Trump's tariff risks have lowered TSMC sentiment despite robust business fundamentals. Overall, the demand for AI and consumer electronics will increase in the next few years, supporting TSMC.

Technically, the RSI is around 21, a level not seen since last April. Following that level, the stock experienced a continued rally, marking a bullish uptrend. Investors should closely monitor the MA(3) for a potential turnaround to confirm the onset of a bull market.

Arm Holdings (ARM)

Arm Holdings shares are also attractive after the recent selloff, nearing support levels. Nvidia and Arm both benefit from the AI wave and share similar properties. Its parent company Softbank is collaborating with OpenAI on the Stargate project, further boosting Arm's growth. Additionally, Arm is working on offering custom data center CPUs, with Meta as the first customer, solidifying its fundamentals.

Technically, Arm's RSI fell to 23.8, a level last seen on August 7. After that, the stock jumped 26% in two weeks and maintained an upward trend. As the current macro sell-off nears its end, Arm is poised for a resilient bounce.

Salesforce (CRM)

Salesforce shares have been sliding due to disappointing earnings last week. However, AI monetization efforts resulted in an 18% increase in Q4 net income despite a 9% year-over-year sales growth. Technically, the RSI is around 22, a level last seen on January 10th, after which the shares jumped. Having lost 20% from its historical high, the current valuation and oversold conditions could push the stock higher.

Bonus Short Stock List

To hedge against further sell-offs, here is a list of short stocks with brief summaries (from a fundamental or technical standpoint):

Tesla: Despite technical bounce signals, the fundamentals are weak as Musk's political interventions could deteriorate Tesla's sales and earnings. Robotaxi is still far off, and China's FSD is below expectations, presenting a conflict of interest as Musk also leads DOGE.

Costco: Earnings are due on Thursday, and the stock is currently overvalued. It may face a sell-off similar to Walmart's after earnings, compounded by tariff warnings.

Raytheon: The stock is at a historical high with an RSI of 81. Trump may reduce military spending.

Eli Lilly: Shares are heading to October levels, with a potential Trump investigation looming. The demand for weight loss drugs is also a concern.

data.title: Anthropic Secures $3.5 Billion in Funding as AI Arms Race Intensifies
data.description:
In a significant development in the artificial intelligence sector, startup Anthropic has announced the successful completion of a $3.5 billion funding round, boosting its valuation to an impressive $61.5 billion. This landmark financing not only underscores market confidence in AI technology but also alters the competitive dynamics within the industry. As a rival to OpenAI, Anthropic has been focused on building secure and reliable AI systems to meet the burgeoning demand for enterprise-level solutions. This focus on security and reliability has helped the company stand out in a crowded market.

The latest funding round was led by lightspeed Venture Partners, with an investment of $1 billion, joined by other prominent investors including General Catalyst, Jane Street, and fidelity Management & Research Company. The successful completion of this round reflects investors' optimistic outlook for the future of artificial intelligence. Originally, Anthropic planned to raise only $2 billion, but overwhelming investor interest led to an increase in the funding amount. Industry insiders view this as a testament to Anthropic's reputation, as well as a positive forecast for the AI sector's potential.

According to sources familiar with the company's financials, Anthropic achieved a $1 billion annual revenue run rate by the end of 2023, marking a 30% increase during 2024. This growth trajectory suggests that Anthropic is on a steady rise. Chief Financial Officer Krishna Rao highlighted in a statement that "this investment will propel us to develop smarter and stronger AI systems, expanding human possibilities and deepening our understanding of AI mechanisms." Such a declaration solidifies Anthropic's commitment to innovation and progress in AI research.

The new funding is expected to focus on the development of next-generation AI models and enhancing computational capabilities, with an emphasis on AI safety research and expansion into international markets, primarily in Asia and Europe. This strategic plan is set to influence the global AI industry's growth, given the increasingly significant role of AI technologies. Recently, Anthropic has intensified its research efforts in software automation, showcasing its leading edge through the introduction of the sonnet AI model and a novel AI agent designed to automate software programming tasks.

Interestingly, Silicon Valley investors continue to pursue leading AI companies like Anthropic, despite the emergence of low-cost AI competitors such as DeepSeek. The founding team, with strong technical backgrounds, instills confidence among investors. Since its inception, Anthropic has garnered support from tech giants like Amazon and Google, demonstrating its market competitiveness.

Anthropic's collaboration with Amazon to power the next-generation AI version of Alexa, named Alexa+, symbolizes its market advances. This partnership not only elevates the intelligence level of the Alexa assistant but also strengthens Anthropic's market positioning. Analysts suggest that as AI technologies continue to expand, Anthropic's close ties with other tech giants will likely amplify its influence in the AI domain.

In the broader AI market, OpenAI is also preparing for a substantially larger funding round, with a potential valuation of $300 billion. This intense competitive landscape presents both uncertainty and challenges for AI technology's future. Against this backdrop, Anthropic's successful fundraising not only enhances its market competitiveness but also accelerates technological development.

Looking ahead, the relentless advancement of AI technology will likely fuel increasing market demand, presenting greater challenges and opportunities for related enterprises. As a forerunner in the industry, Anthropic's strategic development and innovative capacity provide an exemplar for the entire sector. In today's rapidly evolving technological environment, addressing user needs and improving product quality will be critical for all major players. With the infusion of capital and ongoing technological progress, there is justified anticipation that Anthropic will emerge as an even more influential market leader in the future.

data.title: Trump's Crypto Reserve: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP Spark Debate
data.description:
The U.S. government's decision to establish a strategic cryptocurrency reserve has sparked debate among industry participants, with particular focus on the inclusion of XRP. On March 2, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the reserve would hold Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, Cardano, and XRP.

While many in the crypto industry welcomed the initiative as a step toward broader adoption, others questioned the rationale behind XRP's inclusion. Bitcoin maximalists, who have long advocated for a Bitcoin-only reserve, were particularly displeased with the announcement.

Peter Schiff, a prominent economist, gold advocate, and Bitcoin critic, took to Twitter to express his doubts about XRP's inclusion. While he acknowledged the reasoning behind a government-backed Bitcoin reserve, he struggled to see the justification for an XRP reserve. Schiff asked, "Why does the U.S. government need a strategic reserve of XRP? There are a lot of valuable assets that the U.S. government doesn't hold in reserve. What's so special about XRP?"

Schiff's comments sparked a heated discussion, with strong reactions from supporters and skeptics of XRP's inclusion. Members of the XRP Army defended the decision, highlighting XRP's long-standing presence in the market and its potential role in global financial infrastructure. Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson also weighed in, arguing that XRP's technology, resilience through market cycles, and strong community made it a reasonable choice.

Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse addressed the announcement directly, focusing on the broader implications of the strategic reserve. He emphasized the importance of industry collaboration and regulatory clarity, reiterating his stance that a multichain ecosystem would benefit the entire sector. Garlinghouse stated, "Maximalism is the enemy of the industry's progress," and stressed the need for continued dialogue with policymakers.

While the crypto industry remains divided on XRP's role in the strategic reserve, the debate highlights the growing influence of digital assets in global finance. As governments and central banks increasingly recognize the potential of cryptocurrencies, the establishment of a strategic reserve signals a significant step toward broader adoption and integration.

data.title: "Rollblock Surges: Crypto's Next Big Thing?"
data.description:
As the crypto market continues to evolve, investors are seeking the best altcoins to buy in the coming months. March has seen a surge in interest in several promising projects, with XRP, Cardano, Chainlink, and Rollblock leading the pack.

Rollblock, a GameFi platform, has garnered significant attention as the largest presale of 2025. The protocol aims to revolutionize online gaming by eliminating fraud and scams through blockchain security, creating a more transparent and trustworthy experience for players. With over 50,000 early investors and nearly $11 million raised across ten presale rounds, Rollblock is shaping up to be one of the most promising investment opportunities in the crypto space.

XRP, the native token of the XRP Ledger, has also drawn significant attention from traders. Crypto analyst Dark Defender predicts XRP could reach $77.7 by 2027, provided it breaks key resistance levels. He highlights $2.60 and $2.77 as crucial support zones, while resistance stands at $5.85, $8.03, and $18.22. A breakout above $5.85 could push XRP toward $8.03 and $18.22. However, failure to hold support may trigger further selling pressure. Despite potential setbacks, Dark Defender remains bullish, expecting XRP to hit $5.85 between April and August 2024 before surging toward $18.22. If market conditions align, he sees $77.7 as a long-term target.

Cardano, another prominent altcoin, has shown strong fundamentals as the token surged 46.77% in two days, reaching $0.9731. Trading volume spiked 1,807% to $10.74 billion during this rally, which briefly pushed ADA into the eighth-largest cryptocurrency spot, hitting $1.13 before retracing. Network activity has also intensified, with a 157% rise in active wallets and a 200% surge in daily transactions. Cardano’s total value locked (TVL) jumped 38.87% to $499 million. The rally was triggered by Donald Trump’s announcement of a U.S. Crypto Strategic Reserve,

data.title: Hecla Mining (HL): Among the Best Zinc Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds
data.description:
Hecla Mining (HL) has emerged as a top choice among hedge funds looking to invest in the zinc sector. With a strong focus on zinc production and reserves, as well as a diversified metal portfolio, hecla mining offers an attractive investment opportunity for those seeking exposure to the growing demand for zinc in various industries, particularly electric vehicles (EVs) and green technologies.



Hecla Mining's zinc production and reserves are significant compared to its peers. In 2023, the company produced 27.5 million pounds of zinc, higher than many of its peers, such as coeur mining (17.5 million pounds) and alamos gold (12.5 million pounds). Additionally, Hecla Mining has zinc reserves of 145 million pounds, which is also higher than many of its peers. This strong zinc position provides Hecla Mining with a diversified revenue stream and reduces its dependence on silver and gold.

Hecla Mining's diversified metal production, which includes silver, gold, lead, and other metals, further enhances its investment appeal. This diversification allows the company to mitigate risks associated with price fluctuations in a single commodity and take advantage of opportunities in different markets. For instance, when the price of one metal is low, the company can focus on producing and selling other metals that are in high demand, maintaining profitability and maximizing shareholder value.



Hedge funds recognize the benefits of investing in a company with a balanced portfolio of metals, as it provides a hedge against price fluctuations and reduces the overall risk of the investment. Hecla Mining's strong financial health, with a return on equity (ROE) of 1.79% and a return on invested capital (ROIC) of 2.98%, further supports its investment appeal. These positive financial indicators suggest that Hecla Mining is a stable and profitable company, making it an attractive investment for hedge funds.

In conclusion, Hecla Mining's strong zinc production and reserves, combined with its diversified metal portfolio and robust financial health, make it an attractive investment for hedge funds seeking exposure to the growing demand for zinc. As the company continues to expand its operations and increase production, it is well-positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for zinc in various industries, particularly EVs and green technologies. Investors looking to gain exposure to the zinc sector should consider adding Hecla Mining to their portfolios.

data.title: Canal+ to Invest at Least $500 Million in French Cinema by 2027
data.description:
In a significant boost to the French film industry, Canal+, the leading pay TV banner, has announced an agreement with local film guilds to invest at least €480 million ($503 million) in French and European films over the next three years. This commitment, which amounts to approximately $160 million per year, will have a substantial impact on the production, distribution, and job creation in the sector.

The agreement, reached after months of intense negotiations with local guilds, allows Canal+ to maintain its access to movies at six months after their theatrical release. This windowing schedule is crucial for the pay TV giant, as it enables it to offer a wide range of recent films to its subscribers and remain competitive in the market.

Canal+'s investment strategy is a response to the changing landscape of the film industry, with streaming platforms like Disney+ and netflix gaining traction. The agreement with local film guilds ensures that Canal+ remains a key player in the French film industry, supporting the production of a diverse range of films and fostering creativity.

The French pay TV giant's commitment to invest in French and European movies will have a positive impact on the industry in several ways:

1. Production: The investment will fund the production of a wide range of films, fostering creativity and diversity in the French film industry. This includes support for "diversity films," which are films with budgets under €4 million.
2. Distribution: Canal+'s early access to movies will enable it to offer a broader range of recent films to its subscribers, making its services more attractive and potentially increasing its subscriber base. This will also help maintain Canal+'s pole position in the windowing schedule, allowing it to leverage its framework agreements with major American studios.
3. Job creation: The increased investment in the film industry is expected to create jobs and stimulate economic growth in the sector. Multiple projects that were on standby due to the negotiations have now been given the green light, ensuring work for cast and crew members. The increased number of film broadcasts on Canal+ and Cine+ OCS channels will also create more opportunities for employment in the distribution and broadcasting sectors.

In conclusion, Canal+'s investment of at least $500 million in French cinema by 2027 is a significant development for the French film industry. This commitment will support production, distribution, and job creation, ensuring that the industry remains vibrant and competitive in the face of changing market dynamics.

data.title: Evotec and Bristol Myers Squibb: A Promising Neuroscience Collaboration
data.description:
Evotec SE (EVT, MDAX/TecDAX, ISIN: DE0005664809; NASDAQ: EVO) and Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE: BMY) have made significant progress in their strategic neuroscience collaboration, with Evotec receiving a $20 million payment to advance a promising pre-clinical programme in neurodegeneration. This latest achievement underscores the strength of the partnership and its commitment to delivering innovative treatment options for patients suffering from neurodegenerative diseases.

The collaboration, initiated in December 2016, focuses on identifying disease-modifying treatments for a broad range of neurodegenerative diseases. While currently approved therapies primarily focus on symptom management, this partnership aims to develop transformative treatments that can slow or halt disease progression, addressing a significant unmet medical need. The collaboration has already yielded strong results, including the in-licensing of EVT8683 (now BMS-986419) by Bristol Myers Squibb in September 2021. In March 2023, the companies reaffirmed their commitment by extending and expanding the collaboration for an additional eight years.

The $20 million payment to Evotec is a testament to the progress made in the collaboration and the potential of the pre-clinical programme in neurodegeneration. This funding will enable Evotec to further develop and advance the programme, bringing it one step closer to clinical development. The payment also reflects the shared mission of both companies to deliver truly innovative treatment options for patients suffering from neurodegenerative diseases.



The extended collaboration between Evotec and Bristol Myers Squibb is expected to yield more high-potential programmes advancing towards clinical development, further bolstering the joint pipeline in neurodegeneration research. This partnership is a prime example of how strategic collaborations between biotechnology companies and pharmaceutical giants can drive innovation and accelerate the development of transformative therapies for patients in need.

In conclusion, the latest progress in the neuroscience collaboration between Evotec and Bristol Myers Squibb highlights the potential of this strategic partnership in developing innovative treatments for neurodegenerative diseases. With the extended collaboration and the $20 million payment to Evotec, the partnership is well-positioned to continue making significant strides in the fight against these debilitating conditions.

data.title: Best Buy Earnings Preview: Strong Holiday Sales vs. Tariff Headwinds
data.description:
Best Buy (NYSE: BBY) is set to report its fiscal Q4 earnings before the market opens on March 4. Analysts expect revenue of $13.69 billion and adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $2.41, reflecting a year-over-year decline of approximately 6.6% in revenue. While the holiday shopping season was generally strong for electronics, Best Buy’s exposure to discretionary spending trends and e-commerce competition will be key factors in determining its performance.

Key Metrics to Watch

Aside from revenue and EPS, investors will closely monitor:

- Comparable Sales (Comps): Analysts estimate a decline of 1.5%, though Evercore’s estimates suggest a slightly better-than-expected drop of 1%.

- Margins: Best Buy’s ability to manage promotions and vendor-funded discounts will be crucial in protecting profitability.

- Online Sales: Best Buy’s e-commerce segment has lagged behind competitors like Amazon (AMZN), and any continued weakness could further erode investor confidence.

- 2025 Guidance: Given macroeconomic uncertainty and potential tariff impacts, forward-looking commentary will be the most significant part of the report.

Analyst Sentiment and Expectations

Analysts have mixed views on best buy heading into earnings.

- Wedbush expects a strong Q4 print due to a solid holiday season but warns that guidance for 2025 may be soft due to weaker consumer sentiment and high tariff exposure.

- evercore sees a potential downside to $80 per share if the company guides for only modest earnings growth, but also believes strong holiday sales could provide near-term upside.

- Jefferies (JEFF) is bullish on Best Buy’s long-term prospects, citing the company’s marketplace initiative as a potential game-changer. Jefferies has raised its EBITDA estimates by $700 million over the next five years, arguing that Wall Street has yet to fully price in this growth opportunity.

- Evercore (TAP) remains neutral, valuing the stock at $100 based on a 13x earnings multiple.

Tariff Risks Loom Large

Tariffs remain a critical headwind for Best Buy. The company sources about 60% of its cost of goods sold from China, and the proposed 10% tariffs could significantly impact margins. Best Buy has already been shifting some production away from China, but the exposure remains a material risk. Additionally, tariffs on Mexican imports could further squeeze profitability, as Mexico is Best Buy’s second-largest sourcing country.

Industry commentary highlights growing concerns over tariffs. According to a respondent from the Chemical Products sector, "The tariff environment regarding products from Mexico and Canada has created uncertainty and volatility among our customers and increased our exposure to retaliatory measures." A Machinery sector participant added, "Sweeping price increases are incoming from suppliers. Most are noting increases in labor costs, and inflationary pressures are a concern."

Stock Performance and Valuation

Best Buy’s stock has gained 7.3% in the past month, significantly outperforming the S&P 500’s -0.7% decline. The stock is currently trading at around $88.70, with a 52-week range of $69.29 to $103.71. With a price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of 15.14 and a price-to-earnings-growth (PEG) ratio of 2.10, the stock is trading at a discount to historical levels but still faces significant risks.

Some analysts believe the stock has further upside potential if guidance is better than feared. Evercore sees an opportunity for an 8-10% increase to $95-$100 if holiday sales prove to be a meaningful tailwind. However, others caution that weaker consumer confidence and structural challenges from e-commerce competition could push the stock lower.

Conclusion

Best Buy’s Q4 earnings report will provide a crucial update on the health of the consumer electronics market. Strong holiday sales could help deliver an upside surprise, but macro headwinds, tariff risks, and continued market share losses to e-commerce remain key concerns. While the stock has rallied recently, a weak 2025 outlook could cap further gains and shift investor sentiment. All eyes will be on management’s guidance and how they plan to navigate the challenging environment ahead.

data.title: Shoprite's Festive Demand Boosts Earnings, Driving Market Share Growth
data.description:
Shoprite Holdings, South Africa's largest supermarket retailer, reported a strong performance in the six-month period ending 29 December 2023, with half-year sales from continuing operations growing by 9.6%. The group's core business, Supermarkets South Africa, contributed 83.7% to group sales, achieving sales growth of 10.4% and like-for-like sales growth of 6.1%. The rest of Africa supermarkets business saw a 4.1% increase in sales during the same period.



The retailer's impressive results can be attributed to several factors, including a record Black Friday and festive season, which drove sales growth of 8.7% in the three-month quarter ended December. Shoprite's acquisition of 94 stores from Walmart-owned Massmart also contributed to its core business's sales growth of 14.6% in the six-month period. The inclusion of 51 stores acquired from Massmart in the Shoprite brand resulted in a 13.2% sales increase for the Shoprite division.

Shoprite's unwavering execution of its clear value proposition, continued store upgrades, and advances in areas such as fresh, private label, and on-demand execution by Checkers Sixty60 have driven sales growth. Checkers and Checkers Hyper's sales increased by 13.7%, with Checkers Sixty60's sales growing by a further 63.1% over the six months. The Usave brand, which focuses on low-cost discount stores and Usave eKasi container stores, has expanded the Group's reach into underserved communities, contributing to its overall sales growth. Usave increased sales by 12.3% in the six-month period.

Shoprite's expansion into other African countries has also contributed to its overall earnings. The group's rest of Africa supermarkets business, which operates in nine countries, saw a 4.1% increase in sales during the six-month period. This expansion has allowed Shoprite to tap into new markets and diversify its revenue streams, reducing its dependence on the South African market.

Despite the challenges posed by severe rolling power cuts and soaring costs for raw materials, transport, and packaging, Shoprite has managed to maintain its profitability and market share growth. The retailer's ability to adapt to local market conditions and tailor its offerings to meet the needs of its customers has been a key factor in its success. Additionally, the group's focus on cost management and operational efficiency has allowed it to maintain its profitability in the face of increased operational costs.

In conclusion, Shoprite's strong earnings performance in the six-month period ending 29 December 2023 can be attributed to a combination of factors, including a record festive season, strategic acquisitions, and a focus on customer value and operational efficiency. The retailer's expansion into other African countries has also contributed to its overall earnings, presenting both opportunities and challenges. As Shoprite continues to navigate the complexities of the African retail landscape, investors can expect the company to maintain its market share growth and deliver strong financial performance.

data.title: "Pixel Heroes Adventure: Revolutionizing Gaming with Web3 Integration"
data.description:
Pixel Heroes Adventure, a retro-styled massively multiplayer online role-playing game (MMORPG), has recently gained attention for its integration of Web3 technology. The game, developed by a team of passionate gamers and blockchain enthusiasts, offers a unique blend of classic gaming elements and the innovative features of Web3.

The game's Web3 twist allows players to own in-game assets as non-fungible tokens (NFTs) on the blockchain. These NFTs represent unique items, characters, and even real estate within the game's virtual world. By leveraging the power of blockchain, Pixel Heroes Adventure ensures the authenticity, scarcity, and ownership of these digital assets.

One of the key aspects of the game is its decentralized governance model. Players can participate in decision-making processes, such as voting on game updates and new features, by staking their in-game tokens. This model empowers the community and fosters a sense of ownership among players.

The game's developers have also implemented a play-to-earn mechanism, allowing players to generate revenue by participating in various in-game activities. By completing quests, defeating enemies, or selling their NFTs, players can earn cryptocurrency, which can be exchanged for real-world currency.

Pixel Heroes Adventure has received positive feedback from the gaming community, with many praising its nostalgic graphics and engaging gameplay. The integration of Web3 technology has also attracted the attention of blockchain enthusiasts and investors, who see the potential in this innovative gaming model.

The game's success has sparked interest in the broader gaming industry, with many developers exploring the possibilities of Web3 integration. As the gaming landscape continues to evolve, Pixel Heroes Adventure serves as a testament to the potential of blockchain technology in revolutionizing the way we interact with and experience digital worlds.

data.title: "Crypto Crash: $1.09B Liquidated as Trump Tariffs Slam Market"
data.description:
The crypto market experienced a significant downturn on March 4, with the implementation of Trump's tariffs on Mexico and Canada. This event triggered a wave of liquidations, totaling over $1.09 billion in the last 24 hours. Bitcoin, the leading cryptocurrency, plummeted by more than 10% during this period, while top altcoins such as Ethereum (ETH), XRP, Solana (SOL), and Cardano (ADA) saw declines ranging from 15% to 25%.

The crypto market crash was one of the swiftest on record, with over $460 billion wiped off the crypto market cap in just 24 hours. According to Coinglass data, the overall crypto liquidations surged to more than $1.09 billion, with Bitcoin alone contributing over $400 million. The Kobeissi Letter noted that the market experienced an average loss of approximately $19.1 billion per hour over the past day.

Following the announcement of strategic US crypto reserves by President Donald Trump on Sunday, Bitcoin price briefly rallied to $93,000 but faced rejection as Trump tariffs took effect. Market analysts believe that despite Trump's executive order on crypto reserves, it would still need Congressional approval to pass through. As of press time, the BTC price was down 10.23% trading at $83,500 levels, with daily trading volumes jumping by 15% to $77 billion. Crypto market analysts predict that it won't be surprising if Bitcoin crashes in the range of $70,000-$75,000 before resuming a full-blown uptrend.

Throughout February, altcoins have delivered a poor performance, with Ethereum (ETH), Solana (SOL), XRP, and Cardano (ADA) facing significant selling pressure and correcting by 25% over the past month. Over the last 24 hours, the altcoins crash was even more severe, with Ethereum price tanking to $2,000 and on track to register its worst-performing Q1 in history. Crypto market analysts are advising investors to stay patient and not sell in panic. Popular analyst Michael van de Poppe noted that most altcoins are giving back their gains against Bitcoin today due to people wanting to get out, and

data.title: CoreWeave Files for IPO After Record Revenue, $863M Loss
data.description:
AI cloud provider CoreWeave has filed for an initial public offering (IPO) after a breakout year, marking a significant milestone in the tech industry. The New Jersey-based company, which shifted its focus from crypto mining to AI infrastructure six years ago, officially submitted its S-1 registration filing to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Monday. morgan stanley, goldman sachs, and jpmorgan have been named as lead underwriters for the IPO.

CoreWeave's financial performance has been nothing short of impressive. The company reported $1.9 billion in revenue for fiscal 2024, representing a staggering 737% increase compared to 2023. Despite this growth, CoreWeave recorded an $863.4 million net loss, reflecting substantial infrastructure investments and interest expenses on nearly $8 billion in debt. The company's most recent quarterly results showed $747.4 million in revenue with a 76% gross margin and $112.7 million in operating income. CoreWeave also disclosed $15.1 billion in unfulfilled contract obligations, providing significant revenue visibility.

However, some industry experts have raised concerns about the sustainability of CoreWeave's revenue growth. Jeffrey Emanuel, founder and CEO of AI-powered Layer 1 chain Pastel Network, posted on X that CoreWeave's business model relies heavily on quickly depreciating GPUs and servers, and that a shift in the market towards a GPU oversupply scenario could lead to a significant drop in underlying spot earnings.

Founded in 2017 as Atlantic Crypto by former commodities traders Michael Intrator, Brian Venturo, and Brannin McBee, the company initially mined Ethereum before strategically pivoting to AI infrastructure in 2019. This shift positioned CoreWeave to capitalize on the AI boom following OpenAI's ChatGPT release in 2022. Intrator, who currently serves as CEO, controls about 38% of voting power in the company.

CoreWeave's IPO comes at a time when demand for AI infrastructure has been booming, and the company's financial performance reflects this external trend. As the company prepares for its public debut, investors will be closely watching its ability to maintain its impressive growth trajectory and navigate potential market shifts.

data.title: FAA Funds Starlink's Satellite Internet Revolution
data.description:
The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has reportedly directed its staff to find tens of millions of dollars to fund a deal with Elon Musk's Starlink, according to sources familiar with the matter. The move comes as the agency seeks to support the development and deployment of Starlink's satellite internet network, which aims to provide high-speed connectivity to underserved areas around the world.

Starlink, a subsidiary of SpaceX, has been making significant strides in its mission to provide global broadband coverage. The company has launched hundreds of satellites into orbit and has begun offering beta services in several regions, including the United States, Canada, and parts of Europe. Starlink's technology has the potential to revolutionize internet access, particularly in remote and rural areas where traditional connectivity options are limited or non-existent.

The FAA's involvement with Starlink is not limited to this funding effort. The agency has been working with SpaceX to ensure the safety and regulatory compliance of the company's launch operations. In recent years, SpaceX has successfully launched numerous missions using its reusable Falcon 9 and Falcon Heavy rockets, including cargo and crewed missions to the International Space Station (ISS).

The FAA's decision to allocate funds for Starlink highlights the growing importance of satellite internet technology in the global connectivity landscape. As demand for high-speed internet access continues to grow, particularly in underserved regions, governments and private sector companies are increasingly investing in innovative solutions to bridge the digital divide.

The FAA's funding effort for Starlink is part of a broader trend of government support for emerging technologies in the telecommunications sector. Governments around the world are recognizing the potential of satellite internet to drive economic growth, improve access to education and healthcare, and enhance overall quality of life in underserved communities.

As the FAA works to secure the necessary funding for Starlink, the company continues to make progress in its mission to provide global broadband coverage. Starlink's innovative technology and ambitious goals have the potential to transform the way people access the internet, particularly in remote and underserved areas. With the support of the FAA and other stakeholders, Starlink is well-positioned to make a significant impact on the global connectivity landscape in the years to come.
